pages.text: The sin weapons are the late-game centerpiece of the mod. They are not normal loot, and they are not supposed to be simple swords with bigger numbers.$(br2)Every one of them has a matching $(l)Tablet$(), a matching $(l)Idol$(), access to $(l)Void Ashes$(), and the final forge recipe. They also share the Branded-time attunement gate.

$(l)Shared rules$()$(br)$(li)You must be Branded$(li)You must have endured nearly all of the Branded progress track$(li)The tablet is the thematic key$(li)The idol is the forged ritual component$(li)The final recipe is the true awakening, not just a loot drop
The current trio is $(l)Sloth$(), $(l)Pride$(), and $(l)Envy$(). Each punishes a different failure: collapse, loss of superiority, and hollow comparison.
